message.content: @startuml actor User participant UI as "UI" #LightBlue2 box Main Thread #LightGray participant MT1 as "" hidden end box package WorkerThread { rectangle WT1 as "Worker_Thread\n(Processing)" #WhiteSmoke -[hidden]-> WT3 : Processing... } User -> UI: Push the button activate UI group Trigger postToWorkerThread() [Main thread] note right of UI: Get textarea value from DOM activate UT4 loop For each line in text area alt If not empty rect rgb(0,56,98) note over UT7:#ffffff;Send message to worker via postMessage(); end else break endif endloop deactivateUT4 else if error occurs during processing then throw new Error("Failed!"); finally close connection(); return false;}catch(Exception e){System.out.println(e);}finally{if(conn!=null&&!conn.isClosed())try{{ConnectionPool.getInstance().releaseResource((PooledConnectionImpl)((java.sql.Connection)(this)).getUnderlying());}} catch(SQLException ex){//ignore}}}return true;;endifdeactivatetextareaValueWithACKmessagefromworkerthreadbacktomainthreaddisplayitonthescreenforusertoseeresultsdone!
